items.summary: In backend/main.mo, remove all authorization and identity checks from the createSong update function. The function must accept calls from any caller including anonymous without throwing or returning any 'Unauthorized: Only users can create songs' (or equivalent) error. The PIN-protected frontend admin panel is the sole authentication gate — the backend must not enforce any caller identity restriction on createSong.

In backend/main.mo, also verify and remove all authorization and identity checks from the createPoetry and createDua update functions, ensuring they too accept calls from any caller including anonymous without throwing or returning any 'Unauthorized' error. All three create functions (createPoetry, createDua, createSong) must be fully open to anonymous callers.
